meta.purpose: Permanent record of dataset patterns for pipeline calibration and model guidance

source_practice.name: Easthampstead Surgery
source_practice.address: 23 Rectory Lane, Easthampstead, Bracknell, Berkshire RG12 7BB
source_practice.gp: Dr Marshall / Dr Tj Keeling & Partners
source_practice.insight: All 40 documents flow to a single GP practice. In production, multi-practice routing will be needed.

originating_trusts: Frimley Health NHS Foundation Trust (Frimley Park, Wexham Park, Heatherwood)
Royal Berkshire Hospital NHS Foundation Trust
Berkshire Healthcare NHS Foundation Trust (Prospect Park Hospital)
South Central Ambulance Service (SCAS) NHS Foundation Trust
University Hospital Southampton NHS Foundation Trust
Kettering General Hospital NHS Foundation Trust
Evolutio Care Innovations Ltd (ophthalmology referral management)
Expert Health Ltd (online GLP-1 prescribing service)
corpus_overview.format: ALL 40 documents are scanned PDFs — no embedded text. AWS Textract OCR is mandatory for every document.

document_type_taxonomy.description: 21 distinct document types identified, grouped by prefix number used in clinic's filing system

volume_distribution.ophthalmology: ~15% (medical retina, evolutio referral) — driven by diabetic eye disease
volume_distribution.mental_health: ~12% (MH inpatient discharge, CAMHS, psychiatry outpatient, ambulance MH crisis)

nhs_number_formats: Inline in footer: 'NHS Number: 476 028 2297, SURNAME, Forename' (SCAS reports)
patient_name_formats: Name: SURNAME, Forename (RBH Patient Discharge Letter)
Patient Name: Forename SURNAME (Frimley outpatient letters)
Patient Forename / Patient Surname separate fields (SCAS v3.62)
SURNAME, Forename in body: 'Dear Mr Forename SURNAME' (RBH outpatient)
Standalone SURNAME, Forename line (111 First ED Report)

diabetic_eye_disease_cluster.observation: 4 out of 4 ophthalmology letters relate to diabetic retinopathy — the dominant chronic condition in this practice
diabetic_eye_disease_cluster.grading_system: NHS DR grading: R0-R3A, M0-M1, P0-P1 (e.g. R2M1P0 = moderate DR + maculopathy, no PRP)
diabetic_eye_disease_cluster.iop_format: Right X mmHg, Left Y mmHg
diabetic_eye_disease_cluster.va_format: Snellen 6/X or decimal e.g. 0.64 (6/24) or complog e.g. 6/8.7
diabetic_eye_disease_cluster.code_impact: Ophthalmology Letter and Ophthalmology Referral types must extract DR grade, VA, IOP, and PRP status

glp1_weight_management_cluster.observation: 3 Expert Health documents all prescribe GLP-1 agonists for weight loss
glp1_weight_management_cluster.format: Q&A consultation transcript (20+ questions), pages 2-5 contain non-clinical lifestyle advice
glp1_weight_management_cluster.code_impact: Pages 2+ of Expert Health docs should be summarised — not skipped — but clinical content is only on page 1

versions: GP Report for Information v4.7.1 (simple, 2 pages)

v3_62_page_structure.page1: Patient demographics, GP details, incident details, crew, consent
v3_62_page_structure.page2: Main symptom, PMH, medications, NEWS2/POPS scores
v3_62_page_structure.page6: Full body examination, working impression, plan, conveyance decision

ed_discharge_variants.frimley_format: NHS Trust header + 'Discharge Summary' + attendance/arrival method codes in brackets
ed_discharge_variants.rbh_format: 'Patient Discharge Letter' header + MRN as primary ID + detailed medication table
ed_discharge_variants.kettering_format: ED letter format with 'Clinical Summary' narrative block + diagnosis + procedures

arrival_method_codes.8: Emergency Road Ambulance WITH Medical Escort

ambulance_mh.mental_capacity_act: MCA 2005 S5/S6 consent documented on SCAS v3.62 page 1

obstetric_fields.edd_ega: Always present in antenatal discharge — EDD format: DD/MM/YY or DD-MMM-YYYY
obstetric_fields.gravida_parity: G3 P1 format (Gravida = total pregnancies, Para = births past 24 weeks)
obstetric_fields.safeguarding_note: Bereavement marker 'Poppy' and neonatal death are sensitive — must NOT appear in patient-facing summaries

medium_confidence_expected: SCAS reports (multi-column tables, handwritten crew details)
lower_confidence_expected: 111 First ED reports (dense text, small font)

critical_pages.SCAS v3.62: Page 6 contains the clinical conclusion (examination + plan + conveyance) — must not stop at page 1
critical_pages.Expert_Health: Page 1 contains all clinical data — pages 2-5 are Q&A lifestyle content
critical_pages.MH_Inpatient: Page 2 contains medications at discharge — page 3 has past psychiatric history
critical_pages.Ophthalmology_RBH: Page 2 contains fundus exam findings and plan
critical_pages.Evolutio_Referral: Pages 2-3 contain optometrist prescription table and triage notes

multi_page_handling.recommendation: For SCAS v3.62, concatenate ALL pages. For Expert Health, use only page 1 for clinical extraction.

noise_fields_to_filter: Expert Health Q&A lifestyle questions (dietary advice, exercise tips, sleep questions)
Frimley footer (Ministry of Defence partnership, registered office)
RBH footer (patient portal QR code, www.nhs.uk/comment)
Evolutio footer (registration number, Newtown House address)

confidence_threshold_calibration.recommendation: Ambulance and ophthalmology referral docs routinely score 0.70-0.80 due to table-heavy OCR — consider per-type thresholds

high_sensitivity_indicators: Safeguarding referral submitted to Adult/Children's Social Care
Police referral as source of attendance
safeguarding_and_sensitivity.patient_summary_exclusion_rule: High-sensitivity indicators must NOT appear verbatim in patient-facing summaries — they must be paraphrased or omitted
safeguarding_and_sensitivity.code_location: run_bedrock_summarization() patient_summary prompt must include sensitivity instruction

actionable_code_improvements.observation: All 40 docs are scanned PDFs with no embedded text
actionable_code_improvements.action: Textract is correctly mandatory — no fallback to pdfplumber needed

actionable_code_improvements.observation: 21 distinct document types across 9 prefix categories
actionable_code_improvements.action: infer_letter_type() classifier with 21 type handlers + priority ordering

actionable_code_improvements.observation: Type-specific clinical fields differ significantly per document type
Per-type confidence thresholds needed (ambulance/ophthalmology score lower due to tables)
SCAS v3.62 page 6 contains clinical conclusion — must process all pages
actionable_code_improvements.action: run_full_pipeline() already concatenates all pages via pdf_to_images()

actionable_code_improvements.observation: Expert Health pages 2-5 are lifestyle Q&A noise — clinical content only on page 1
actionable_code_improvements.action: For Medication/Prescriber Letter, limit Bedrock input to first 1500 chars (page 1 only)

actionable_code_improvements.observation: Safeguarding and bereavement markers must be protected in patient-facing summaries
actionable_code_improvements.action: Add sensitivity clause to patient_summary prompt

actionable_code_improvements.observation: Hospital trust can be identified from document header text
actionable_code_improvements.action: extract_hospital_trust() function to identify originating trust

actionable_code_improvements.observation: DR grading (R0-R3A M0-M1 P0-P1) is a structured data field in ophthalmology letters
actionable_code_improvements.action: extract_clinical_specifics() already extracts retinopathy grade for Ophthalmology Letter type

actionable_code_improvements.observation: Arrival method codes in Frimley ED letters have semantic meaning
actionable_code_improvements.action: ARRIVAL_METHOD_CODES lookup dict for human-readable descriptions
